title: epiphyllum phyllanthus
intro: Epiphyllum phyllanthus, also known as the Queen of the Night, is a type of flowering cactus native to Central and South America, characterized by its large, white, fragrant flowers that bloom only at night. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Epiphyllum phyllanthus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
